info.longName: WisdomTree U.S. Quality Dividend Growth Fund

funds_data.description: Under normal circumstances, at least 80% of the fund's total assets (exclusive of collateral held from securities lending) will be invested in constituent securities of the index and investments that have economic characteristics that are substantially identical to the economic characteristics of such constituent securities. The index is a fundamentally weighted index that consists of dividend-paying U.S. common stocks with growth characteristics. The fund is non-diversified.
